# Extracao: blogpost-2

- **Fonte:** blogpost-2.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

In the last few days we have gotten all kinds of questions
about our upcoming Copywriting Course. In fact, it's safe to
say that we have NEVER had this much interest in one of our
courses BEFORE IT WAS EVEN RELEASED.

In any case, rather than sending you a super-long email, I
thought I would put this on the blog...

Question: There's a lot of information out there about
copywriting, what makes this course unique?

Answer: After teaching thousands entrepreneurs over the
years... the thing I keep hearing from people is that they
want a step-by-step system for creating copy. And they are
sick of buying big boxes of stuff that they make it through.

So I sat down to build the perfect system to overcome these
two issues.

First of all, I created a complete end-to-end curriculum
that walks your through the exact system I have used to
create 19 different "million dollar" letters.

And the delivery of the course is truly unique -it's an
online teaching system - similar to a university style
course that automatically tracks what sections you have
already completed, and it even includes tests that make sure
you "get" all the key concepts.

Of course, we will still mail a bunch of supporting material
out to you... but the "meat" of the course is delivered
online via audio and video.

And the bottom line is that this isn't a scatter-shot
approach like so many other courses. It's completely step-
by-step, both in the content and the delivery.

And to MAKE SURE that you complete the course, I have a HUGE
graduation gift planned for you when you "graduate" from the
course.


Question: When is the course going to be released?

Answer: The release date is Wednesday, October 18th at noon
eastern U.S. time.

We have an amazing list of bonuses for you, but they will be
limited both in quantity and time. In other words, you will
want to act quickly if you want to qualify for the best
bonus package.


Question: Why don't you just release it now?

Answer: We are still putting a few finishing touches on it,
and more importantly - we want to give everyone a fair
warning so they have a fair chance at our bonus package.


Question: How much will the course cost?

Answer: We will be releasing the price soon. I can
say this... many copywriting seminars these days
are going for $5,000.00. Some "workshops" are
going for as high as $10,000.00. This course will
be priced MUCH lower. 

And it going to have all kinds of extra bonuses you
don't get with those workshops and seminars - you
will be able to study and watch these lessons over
and over, at your leisure, in your home or office.

Studies have shown that for optimal learning, we
need to "hear" material more than once. You just
don't get that in a live seminar setting. The way
we have structured this course all but forces you
to truly master the material... so that you have
the same step-by-step copywriting formula that Dan
and I use over and over and over. 



I will have more updates and answer more questions
in the next couple of days... so keep an eye on
this blog.
